Case Studies

Real Results for Local Businesses

See how we helped Santa Barbara businesses dominate local search and grow their customer base.

HVACSanta Barbara

Coastal HVAC

Challenge:
Invisible on Google, relying on word-of-mouth
Results:
  • Position 1 for 'HVAC Santa Barbara'
  • +280% organic traffic
  • 12 new customers/month from search
"We went from getting 2-3 calls a week to 5-6 calls a day. Best investment we ever made."
— Mike T., Owner

— Dave R., Owner

Paragon Wellness

Challenge:
New location, zero online presence
Results:
  • #2 for 'med spa Santa Barbara' in 90 days

"We opened with no customers. Within 3 months we were booked solid. Local SEO was the key."
— Dr. Chen, Founder
